items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the status controls for provisioning and deprovisioning flows, but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps focus on various aspects of the booking and member management processes, but none address the specific need for status controls, leading to an inconclusive verdict. This indicates a lack of concrete evidence to assess the requirement.
